items.title: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform Initiative
items.description: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform initiative focused on improving charge point connectivity & protocol gateway, charge point management, strengthening customer value for Enterprise CPO Operations Director, and evolving delivery across Web Portal, Public APIs.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase profitable charging network through stronger charge point connectivity & protocol gateway support and cleaner workflow execution.
Increase network utilization through stronger charge point management support and cleaner workflow execution.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual recurring revenue from cpms through stronger charge point connectivity & protocol gateway support and cleaner workflow execution.
Increase account expansion through stronger charge point management support and cleaner workflow execution.

productBricks.change: Extended Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Charge Point Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Session Orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Web Portal.
Introduced workflow updates in Public APIs.
Introduced workflow updates in Partner Integrations.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform: Enterprise CPO Operations Director validated discovery
